_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check. The exhaustive per-content history lives in scripts/content-backlog.json (one detailed entry per shipped module); this file keeps only the current snapshot plus the balance method.

observed.note: BOSS-MECHANIC-6 / The Flarebrand Duelist (2026-07-17, LADDER 2 #19, [A/B]): the SIXTH apex boss mechanic, TEMPO — a per-mille chance-based DOUBLE-STRIKE (flurry), grade 'F', red. A genuinely NEW axis: swing FREQUENCY (the five prior mechanics each reshaped a SINGLE swing; tempo adds a second swing on the same turn), the offensive MIRROR of the ward. New helper lj.enemy.flurries(enemy) (returns false BEFORE any rng for non-tempo enemies => zero extra RNG); js/combat.js wraps the boss turn in a `for (swing=0; swing<swings && heroHealth>0; swing++)` loop (swings = flurries()?2:1), so a lethal first blow skips the follow-up and the hero still dies only on the boss's OWN turn => the shared outcome.actor health-check needs NO killing-blow special case (unlike thorns). Rotation size%5->size%6 (F at realms 10/16/22), all red; isBoss('F') + creaturesAndItemsMap.F + spriteMap.F=[0,9] (reuses boss sprite). Telegraph 'blurs into a flurry of blows!' via the existing span.telegraph + `told` dedupe (NO new CSS). BALANCE: clean sixth SIBLING reusing the [5,7,82,1,3,5,2] peer block EXACTLY, per-mille CHANCE the only knob. KEY FINDING: tempo's win-rate response SATURATES past ~chance 275 (isolated sweep 100->43.4 / 150->42.2 / 200->40.2 / 275->39.7 / 300->39.6 pooled / 350->39.5, FLAT past 275) because deep fights are decided by a margin wider than the +/-10% boss-damage a higher chance adds — so the isolated rate FLOORS ~39.5% via chance alone and (peer block fixed per spec) F is a slightly-EASIER peer (~39.6% vs siblings' 38.2-38.97%), still shipped-NEUTRAL since F is 1/6 of deep bosses. LOAD-BEARING: isolated A/B (all deep = Duelist) OFF (chance 0) ~45.0% -> ON (chance 300) 39.6% pooled 21k = swing ~5.4pt (~13 sigma), matching the siblings' 5-7pt. Correctness PROVEN: a seeded-mulberry32 3600-fight diff (a/b/c/d/B/T/W/S/M/H x realms 1-9) is BIT-IDENTICAL to HEAD for every non-F fight. Shipped `node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check` = 36.5% (2190/6000) IN-BAND [25,75], beatable+survivable (legendary-set 2190 / died-boss 2812 / died-room 998, avg realm 7.13, deepest 10), structural green (26,400 rooms, 2,000 boss arenas) — statistically dead-on the clean origin/main baseline 36.7% (6000, same session; a 0.2pt gap is <0.5 sigma at n=6000, and selfplay is UNSEEDED). JS-all 33.27KB brotli (<=55KB), CSS 1.36KB (<=5KB) unchanged. NEW browser test (tests/playtest/telegraphs.spec.ts, now 4): a real realm-10 Flarebrand fight telegraphs the flurry EXACTLY ONCE. GOTCHA it surfaced: the flurry telegraph lives on the SECOND swing, which only forms if the hero SURVIVES the first — a gearless hero is one-shot at realm 10, so the probe buffs the hp STAT (real max HP; NOT stats.health=1e9, a no-op vs the max cap) to outlast the first blow. Full suite 11/11 green. GOTCHA for boss-trophy-drop (id 20): tempo needed NO harness mirror (it lives inside the real lj.hero.fight); a REWARD/spawn change DOES need one. GOTCHA for a 7th mechanic: only turn-escalation remains of {execute,tempo,turn-escalation}; tempo's saturating response means a frequency mechanic can't be pushed to a harder peer via its knob — a ramp axis has more headroom. The realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base remains the primary GLOBAL difficulty lever. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
